zh.lifeSummary: 當John Copsey於大約1520年出生在英國素福爾可蕾托 霍尼亞斯時，他的父親Johannis John Copsey11518歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie16歲。他於大約1540年與Alice Ann Sheppherd在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年5月18日在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Copsey于大约1520年出生在英国素福爾可蕾托 霍尼亞斯时，他的父亲Johannis John Copsey11518岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie16岁。他于大约1540年与Alice Ann Sheppherd在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年5月18日在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Copsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the Old Norse personal name Kupsi, Kofsi, of uncertain origin but perhaps to be compared with Norwegian kufsa ‘to bustle’ or dialect Swedish kofsa ‘slut’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Copsey was born about 1520, in Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, England, his father, Johannis John Copsey, was 11518 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie, was 16. He married Alice Ann Sheppherd about 1540, in Bury St Edmunds St Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 18 May 1571, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Copsey est né environ 1520, à Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Johannis John Copsey, avait 11518 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alice Ann Sheppherd environ 1540, à Bury St Edmunds St Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1571, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Copsey è nato il circa 1520 nel Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Johannis John Copsey, aveva 11518 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alice Ann Sheppherd circa 1540, nel Bury St Edmunds St Mary, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 maggio 1571, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Copseyが約1520年にイギリススフォルクリットル ホールニングシェアスで生まれた時，父Johannis John Copseyは11518歳，母Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsieは16歳であった。約1540年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズ スト マリーでAlice Ann Sheppherdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年5月18日にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで52歳で死去した。

ko.Bury St Edmunds St Mary, Suffolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 메리

ko.lifeSummary: John Copsey(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 수폴크 리틀 호른잉셰앳h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannis John Copsey(은)는 11518세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 메리에서 Alice Ann Sheppherd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Copsey nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Johannis John Copsey, tinha 11518 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Ann Sheppherd aproximadamente 1540, em Bury St Edmunds St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1571, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Copsey родился около 1520 г. в местности литл хаурнингшит, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Johannis John Copsey было 11518 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Walker Copsey, Copsie, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ann Sheppherd около 1540 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 мая 1571 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Alice Ann Sheppherd aproximadamente 1540, en Bury St Edmunds St Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
